creator: eric.j.christeson@gmail.com
text:
After partitioning my disc with 2 UFS partitions and booting sysinstall, fdisk doesn't find any partitions on the disc.  I booted with http://people.freebsd.org/~grehan/miniinst.iso which found the partitions fine and was able to format them.

How-To-Repeat: Partition hard drive and boot into sysinstall.  No partitions are found in fdisk.
